title: Nexus ErrorResponse
description: Canonical Local API error detail. The daemon wraps this as `{ success: false, error: ErrorResponse, request_id?: string }` on the wire; this schema models the stable, contract-locked `error` detail shared across all Local API failure paths (F-E1).

code.description: Stable, machine-readable error code. New endpoints use lowercase snake_case `<resource>_<failure>` (e.g. `work_not_found`); the daemon's legacy coarse codes (e.g. `INVALID_INPUT`, `NOT_FOUND`) remain valid.

message.description: Human-readable, actionable error message safe for CLI/UI display.

details.description: Optional structured context such as IDs, field names, or validation paths. Do not place unstructured stack traces here.
